'''shathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oxishly|oxishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oxishly|oxishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shathate|shathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shathatesher|shathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatesherĂ«m|shathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shathatero|shathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathateshĂ«|shathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathateshĂ«m|shathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishathatero|gokishathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathateshĂ«|gokishathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathateshĂ«m|gokishathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshathankerom|goshathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathankeshĂ«|goshathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathankeshĂ«m|goshathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshathankeya|goshathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shathaterom|shathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathatemu|shathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shathateya|shathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishathaterom|gokishathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathatemu|gokishathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishathateya|gokishathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shathathate|shathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shathathatesher|shathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathatesherĂ«m|shathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shathathatero|shathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathathateshĂ«|shathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathateshĂ«m|shathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishathathatero|gokishathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathathateshĂ«|gokishathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathateshĂ«m|gokishathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshathathankerom|goshathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathathankeshĂ«|goshathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathathankeshĂ«m|goshathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshathathankeya|goshathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shathathaterom|shathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathathatemu|shathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shathathateya|shathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishathathaterom|gokishathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathathatemu|gokishathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishathathateya|gokishathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠte|shĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠtesher|shĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠtero|shĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠtero|gokishĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠthĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠthĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠterom|shĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠtemu|shĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠthĂŠteya|shĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠterom|gokishĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠthĂŠteya|gokishĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafthafte|shafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafthaftesher|shafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafthaftesherĂ«m|shafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafthaftero|shafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafthafteshĂ«|shafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafthafteshĂ«m|shafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafthaftero|gokishafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafthafteshĂ«|gokishafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafthafteshĂ«m|gokishafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafthafnkerom|goshafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafthafnkeshĂ«|goshafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafthafnkeshĂ«m|goshafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafthafnkeya|goshafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafthafterom|shafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafthaftemu|shafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafthafteya|shafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafthafterom|gokishafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafthaftemu|gokishafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafthafteya|gokishafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
